description: Payment release board output for PAYREL-TEST-004. Return only this JSON shape.

release_bill_ids.description: Candidate AP bill IDs that can be released after AP and entity gate review. Sort bill IDs lexicographically ascending.

hold_bill_ids.description: Candidate AP bill IDs that must remain on hold. Sort bill IDs lexicographically ascending.

hold_reason_by_bill.description: One controlled release outcome or primary hold reason for each candidate bill ID.

compliance_blocked_business_ids.description: Business IDs in the board that fail the entity gate as of 2025-06-01. Sort business IDs lexicographically ascending.

payment_priority_ranking.description: Released bill IDs in payment priority order: oldest due date first, then bill ID.

ap_balance_released_total.description: USD total amount of released candidate AP bills, rounded to 2 decimals.

board_status.description: Overall board disposition after reviewing all candidate bills.

ordering_rules.payment_priority_ranking: Sort released bill IDs by due_date ascending, then bill_id ascending.
ordering_rules.hold_reason_by_bill: Include exactly the five candidate AP bill IDs as keys.
